channel.title: Prices (Fares, Fees and Rates) - Tag - bounds.dev
channel.description: Prices (Fares, Fees and Rates) - Tag - bounds.dev

item.title: Tariff Troubles in the Shopping Aisle
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariff Troubles in the Shopping Aisle

When tariffs make shopping less sweet,
Consumers feel duped on the street.
Prices soar with each buy,
Trump’s trade rules apply,
As companies raise costs in defeat.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Companies Are Raising Prices as Tariffs Hit
  • How the End of a U.S. Tax Loophole Hurts Chinese Companies
  • Exxon and Chevron Report Lower Profits While Girding for Tariffs

item.title: Trump's Economic Balancing Act
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Economic Balancing Act

Trump promised on Day 1, costs to drop,
But now his ambitions must stop.
He reshapes the fed,
Hires, fires instead,
While Ukraine pitches deals non-stop.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Softens Tone on Inflation After Pledging to Lower Prices
  • Trump’s Plan to Remake the Federal Work Force
  • How Ukraine Pitched Trump on a Deal for Critical Minerals

item.title: Trump's Topsy-Turvy Terrain
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Topsy-Turvy Terrain

In Trump’s world, disaster’s a game,
States must manage, he firmly proclaimed.
Aid’s now a debate,
Egg prices inflate,
And migration sees policies re-framed.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Says States Should Manage Disasters. Former FEMA Leaders Agree.
  • Trump Officials Move to Quickly Expel Migrants Biden Allowed In Temporarily
  • Egg Prices Are High. They Will Likely Go Higher.
